description: Title of the event: Indian Army: Where a Unique Life Awaits YouObjective: The objective of this event was to bring the story of a brave soldier like Lt. Col Arun Sharma to everybody and inspire aspirants to explore the Indian Army as a career and understand how unique it is.The webinar informed us about the scope of pursuing life in the army.
